Chat.title: Chat with Haweli
Chat.welcome: Hi! I'm Haweli, your AI waiter. What can I get you today?
Chat.orderConfirmed: Order confirmed! Your food is being prepared 🍳
Chat.welcomeMessage: Welcome to Haweli! 🍽️ Here are the available tables. Please choose one to start your journey:

About.p1: Haweli is a representative meeting place to exchange ideas, have fun and spend time together. Our aim is for you to feel comfortable and satisfied with us.
About.p2: We always pay attention to warmth and friendly service in an ambiance designed with warm colors and a cozy atmosphere. Experience a culinary journey through India.

Menu.title: Our Menu
Menu.spiceNote: Of course, you also decide on the spiciness of your dish.
Menu.butterChickenDesc: Chicken breast fillet in butter-tomato sauce, incl. daal, rice and naan
Menu.lambBiryaniDesc: Fried rice with lamb, almonds, raisins and cashews
Menu.chickenTikkaDesc: Chicken breast fillet with peppers and onions, incl. daal and naan
Menu.palakPaneerDesc: Fresh spinach with homemade cheese, incl. daal and naan
Menu.vegBiryaniDesc: Fried rice with vegetables, almonds, raisins and cashews
Menu.kadhiChawalDesc: Kadhi with rice — a traditional North Indian dish

Services.aiDesc: Our intelligent chatbot takes your order — fast, easy and personal. Choose your table, browse the menu and order directly in the chat.

Reservation.title: Reserve Your Table
Reservation.desc: We look forward to welcoming you soon. For larger groups or special requests, please contact us directly.
Reservation.privacy: By submitting the request you accept our privacy policy.

Footer.desc: Authentic Indian cuisine and first-class dishes in Germany.
Footer.rights: © 2026 Haweli Indian Cuisine. All rights reserved.

Order.subtitle: Scan, select your table, and start ordering!
Order.tryLater: Please check back in a few minutes
